creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #2)
If you have options saved before you installed poudriere, you can share them with poudriere by symlinking like below. Don't forget to backup or rename /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/options directory before doing below not to be lost.

# ln -s /var/db/ports /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/options

More info about casual (completely local builds) configurations for poudriere are available below.

  https://brew.bsd.cafe/TomAoki/Tips-and-Tricks/src/branch/main/poudriere

These are based on my own configurations.
Would be updated/fixed once I noticed some important changes/progresses, maybe not just-in-time, though.
